name: 10q11_22_recurrent_CNV
description: 10q11.22 recurrent microdeletion/microduplication region flanked by paralogous SDs containing GPRIN2, NPY4R, PPYR1 and PTPN20 paralogs. Variable phenotype with developmental delay and dysmorphic features.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD-rich region with multiple flanking SD blocks; complex paralog families (NPY4R, GPRIN2, PTPN20, ANXA8L) recurrently expanded; rearrangement-prone.
